ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_type" INTEGER /* Type of the institution (e.g., public, private) */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region where the institution is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "institution_size" TEXT /* Size of the institution (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students currently enrolled */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "student_faculty_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to faculty */,
  "endowment" REAL /* Total endowment of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_institution_type FOREIGN KEY ("institution_type") REFERENCES institution_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_data" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment data entry */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment data */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "undergraduate_count" INTEGER /* Number of undergraduate students */,
  "graduate_count" INTEGER /* Number of graduate students */,
  "international_student_count" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "domestic_student_count" INTEGER /* Number of domestic students */,
  "male_count" INTEGER /* Number of male students */,
  "female_count" INTEGER /* Number of female students */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* JSON object containing counts of students by race/ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_data_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_data" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth data entry */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the enrollment period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the enrollment period */,
  "percentage_increase" REAL /* Percentage increase in enrollment */,
  "undergraduate_growth" REAL /* Percentage increase in undergraduate enrollment */,
  "graduate_growth" REAL /* Percentage increase in graduate enrollment */,
  "international_growth" REAL /* Percentage increase in international student enrollment */,
  "domestic_growth" REAL /* Percentage increase in domestic student enrollment */,
  "male_growth" REAL /* Percentage increase in male student enrollment */,
  "female_growth" REAL /* Percentage increase in female student enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_data_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution type (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Pacific, Mountain) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, policymaker) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., enrollment, growth) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, institution) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., enrollment, growth) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
